ignorePatterns:
node_modules/**
dist/**
build/**
coverage/**
.vite/**
.next/**
.cache/**
*.lock
package-lock.json
yarn.lock
pnpm-lock.yaml
assets/**/*.png
assets/**/*.jpg
assets/**/*.jpeg
assets/**/*.gif
assets/**/*.webp
**/*.generated.*

rules.rule: Flag unpinned third-party GitHub Actions, broad write permissions, persisted checkout credentials in write-token jobs, pull_request_target misuse, and untrusted GitHub context inside shell commands.
Treat CLI inputs, URLs, file paths, and subprocess arguments as untrusted. Flag RCE, SSRF, path traversal, unsafe shell usage, and missing regression tests.
Review for prompt injection, tool-permission creep, destructive-action ambiguity, hidden persistence, and secret exfiltration risks.
Ensure package and distribution claims only list official ECC surfaces. Flag unofficial npm packages, stale historical repo paths, and misleading install instructions.

files.description: ECC disclosure policy, official package surfaces, out-of-scope rules, and supply-chain guardrails.
Workspace-level agent routing and operating constraints.
